name: "OBS-001: Production metrics and alerting"

title: "[OBS-001] Production metrics and alerting for version conflicts and sync failures"
labels: ["observability", "high-priority"]
assignees: []
---

## Description
The application now emits metrics for `version_conflicts`, `sync_failures`, and `checkout_errors`. We need to wire these up to our production monitoring stack to ensure we have visibility into the health of the optimistic concurrency control and offline sync mechanisms.

## Deliverables
- [ ] Prometheus exporter or push gateway integration for the frontend metrics.
- [ ] Grafana dashboards visualizing `psa_version_conflicts_total`, `psa_sync_failures_total`, and `psa_checkout_errors_total`.
- [ ] Configured Grafana alerts (e.g., HighVersionConflictRate).
- [ ] Alert runbook for on-call engineers.

## Owner
SRE Team
